song.title: My All in On the Altar
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) My spirit, soul, and body, Dear Lord, I give to Thee, A consecrated off’ring, Thine evermore to be.
[C1] Chorus My all is on the altar; Lord, I am all Thine own; Oh, may my faith ne’er falter! Lord, keep me Thine alone.
[V2] 2) O Jesus, mighty Savior, I trust in Thy great name; I look for Thy salvation, Thy promise now I claim.
[V3] 3) Now, Lord, I yield my members, From sin’s dominion free, For warfare and for triumph, As weapons unto Thee.
[V4] 4) Oh, blissful self-surrender, To live, my Lord, by Thee; Now, Son of God, my Savior, Live out Thy life in me.
[V5] 5) I’m Thine, O dear Lord Jesus, Washed in Thy precious blood, Sealed by Thy Holy Spirit, A sacrifice to God.
[C2] My all is on the altar; I’m waiting for the fire; I’m waiting, waiting, waiting; I’m waiting for the fire.
song.author: mary Dagworty James
